particulars.description: By way of first fixed charge:-. (I) all freehold and leasehold land and buildings of the company both present and future including any land and buildings specified in section 3 of the schedule and all trade fixtures and fittings and all plant and machinery from time to time in or on any such land and buildings;. (Ii) all intellectual property now owned or at any time hereafter to be owned by the company.. Notification of addition to or amendment of charge.
